description: Happy path: full inputs for a dedicated video pitch returns personalized paragraph, 3 subject lines, and personalization notes with FTC flag

input.brand_fit_notes: Their aged brass pulls match the moody-vintage aesthetic; popular in kitchen and bathroom DIY makeovers

expect.pitch_paragraph: 150 to 250 words; names the brand; connects product category to creator's aesthetic and audience; proposes a dedicated video format with concrete framing; closes with a call to action
expect.subject_line_options: array of exactly 3 strings, each under 60 characters
expect.personalization_notes: array containing at minimum FTC disclosure reminder and brand contact verification

prohibit: generic flattery like 'I love your brand' without specific connection
fabricated subscriber counts, engagement metrics, or past campaign results
fewer or more than 3 subject line options
missing FTC disclosure reminder in personalization_notes
em dashes anywhere in the output

description: Minimal required inputs: brand_name, brand_product_category, and proposed_format only; no fit notes or pillar

input.brand_product_category: linen throw blankets and pillow covers

expect.pitch_paragraph: 150 to 250 words; draws fit language from brand-engine since brand_fit_notes absent
expect.personalization_notes: includes FTC reminder, brand contact check, and flags that brand_fit_notes and alex_pillar were absent and would strengthen the pitch

prohibit: fabricated specific claims about brand alignment without brand_fit_notes
pitch_paragraph shorter than 150 words or longer than 250 words
personalization_notes missing the gap flag for absent optional fields
em dashes anywhere in the output

description: Edge case: out-of-niche product category is rejected or flagged rather than producing a misleading pitch

expect.fabrication_check: FLAG with reason explaining the product category is outside the moody-vintage home decor niche
expect.personalization_notes: flags that gaming headsets do not align with the creator's niche and audience

prohibit: pitch paragraph that fabricates a niche connection between gaming peripherals and moody-vintage home decor
fabrication_check PASS for an out-of-niche product
subject lines that misrepresent the creator's content focus
